overview.description: The Franklin Short-Term Municipal Income ETF (FTMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to investment grade US municipal bonds with maturities of three years or less. FTMS was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
